reviews.review_description:
Bought this for my son, he really seems to enjoy it. I think it has a lot of potential as a kid friendly game, you shoot but nothing shoots back or comes towards you.
Things I'd like to see..
Making most things destructible.
More weapons, could even be found when destroying objects.
More "enemies"
Maybe even a timer
Can even include a story mode or rpg where you need to walk around the map.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your review! This is our first game, and so had to make it relatively simple. At first, we had much destructible objects in the game, but it turned out we are using a destruction kit that wasn't made for mobile or VR, so it didn't give us the framerates that Oculus requires. 

We will look into your other requests as soon as we are able.
